slugs.concept: Data stewards sort a sensitive dataset into approved and held-back streams before a reviewed AI analysis.
A creator chooses an expressive personalized avatar sticker for a casual community message.
A small accounting team routes receipts, invoice evidence and payment reconciliation to a final human month-end review.
Clinic colleagues resolve an overlapping appointment by moving blank color cards into a shared time plan.
Human makers test a physical no-code process with gates, pipes and a clear handoff from request to result.
Sales colleagues qualify seedlings as leads in a greenhouse and hand the promising case to its next owner.
A repair-shop support specialist escalates a difficult customer case and hands the case folder to a technician.
A field worker submits a travel receipt while a finance reviewer applies a human approval seal and begins reimbursement.
Travelers organize a sketched idea and pass it between a paper notebook, a camera and a shared handoff.

visual_inspection.notes: All nine outputs were visually inspected; one calendar variant was regenerated to remove readable-looking clock and schedule marks.
